leadText: Ancient Crown redirects here. For the item in the Mystery Dungeon series, see Treasure Collection → Crown. The Relic Crown (Japanese: こだいのおうかん Ancient Crown) is a valuable item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Relic Crown serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A crown made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E A heavy crown made by an ancient civilization about 3,000 years ago. Sw Sh BD SP LA A heavy crown made by an ancient civilization about three thousand years ago. S V A crown made by an ancient civilization about three thousand years ago.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Relic Crown bears resemblance to the crown that Ghetsis places on N 's head during the game intro of Pokémon Black and White .
